personalInfo.title: Fullstack Developer
personalInfo.tagline: Turning Figma designs into pixel-perfect interfaces and building robust backends — 5 years crafting web and mobile experiences.
bio: Fullstack Developer with 5 years of experience specializing in modern web and mobile application development. Proficient in the JavaScript ecosystem — React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript — and experienced with Python for backend services. Passionate about translating designs into high-quality, pixel-perfect and accessible UIs.
Strong collaborator in Agile/Kanban environments, focused on consistent delivery, performance optimization and long-term code stability. Currently open to remote opportunities.

saas-dashboard.title: SaaS Analytics Dashboard
saas-dashboard.description: Analytics platform with real-time visualizations, authentication and multitenancy.
saas-dashboard.longDescription: Full-featured dashboard with interactive charts using Recharts, JWT authentication, team management and PDF report exports.

ecommerce-api.title: E-commerce API
ecommerce-api.description: Complete RESTful API for e-commerce with payments, inventory and notifications.

design-system.title: Design System
design-system.description: React component library with Storybook, tests and automatic documentation.

task-manager.title: Task Manager App
task-manager.description: Task management app with drag & drop, filters and real-time collaboration.

cli-tool.title: Dev CLI Tool
cli-tool.description: CLI tool for automating development workflows with project scaffolding.

portfolio.title: This Portfolio
portfolio.description: Personal portfolio built with React, TypeScript and TailwindCSS with a Dark Minimal theme.

exp-1.description: Engineered and shipped high-impact features for a specialized web application, working closely with UI/UX teams and driving consistent product delivery in an Agile environment.
highlights: Built SEO-optimized front-end with Next.js and robust backend services with Python
Translated Figma designs into pixel-perfect, responsive and accessible UIs
Actively contributed to Kanban workflows and sprint planning

exp-2.description: Maintained and scaled a sales management platform, implementing performance optimizations and integrating new features to enhance sales efficiency.
highlights: Reduced load times by 40% through performance optimizations
Integrated AI and Geolocation features to enhance sales route efficiency
Resolved critical production bottlenecks improving system stability and response times

exp-3.description: Developed and maintained features for a sales-oriented web application, leading legacy code refactoring efforts to improve scalability and reduce bugs.
highlights: Refactored legacy code increasing system efficiency by 30% and reducing critical bugs by 40%
Developed new features significantly enhancing user experience and system performance
Updated and standardized libraries across the platform ensuring long-term stability
